purpose: Verify the completed client runtime delivery for TUI, Neovim/Vim and Eclipse with unit, integration, smoke, e2e, security and release-gate tests.
assumption: todo.json track client_runtime_delivery_after_skeletons is fully implemented correctly before this test track is executed.
goal: Prove that the implemented TUI, Neovim/Vim and Eclipse client surfaces are runnable, thin, safe, test-covered and merge-ready.
success_criteria: TUI runtime starts in automated or scripted smoke mode.
Neovim plugin loads headlessly and exposes expected Ananta commands.
Vim compatibility is either tested or explicitly marked deferred and enforced.
Eclipse plugin project existence/build/install path is tested or explicitly deferred/blocked according to runtime inventory.
All client surfaces use backend APIs and cannot bypass policy, approval, audit or bounded-context rules.
Golden path tests verify client goal submission to task/artifact result with mocked worker/LLM execution.
Release gate blocks false runtime claims.
architecture_guardrails: Tests must verify executable behavior, not only foundation services.
Tests must fail on .keep-only or docs-only client surfaces if runtime_mvp is claimed.
No test may treat foundation_only as runtime_complete.
Security and approval tests must include negative cases.
Manual smoke checks are allowed only where automation is impractical, and must be explicitly marked.

milestones.title: Shared client contract and security tests

tasks.title: Runtime inventory evidence tests add
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify data/client_surface_runtime_inventory.json contains runtime evidence for every surface classified as runtime_mvp or runtime_complete.
Tests fail if runtime evidence contains only .keep files, docs or foundation services.
Tests verify TUI, Neovim/Vim and Eclipse status values match actual repository artifacts.

tasks.title: Client surface audit script tests expand
acceptance_criteria: tests/test_audit_client_surface_entrypoints.py covers CRT task mappings.
Tests verify audit_client_surface_entrypoints.py fails on skeleton-only runtime claims.
Tests verify audit passes when real runtime files and required commands/build metadata exist.

tasks.title: Todo summary consistency tests add
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify tasks_status_summary matches actual task counts.
Tests verify milestone and execution_stage_summary counters match referenced task IDs.
Tests fail if done/todo counters drift from real task status.

tasks.title: Documentation command verification add
acceptance_criteria: Documented TUI start command is validated or explicitly marked manual.
Documented Neovim/Vim load/test commands are validated or explicitly marked manual.
Documented Eclipse build/install commands are validated or explicitly marked manual/deferred.

tasks.title: External client API contract tests add
acceptance_criteria: Contract tests cover health, capabilities, goals, tasks, artifacts, approvals, traces and errors.
Tests verify fields used by TUI, Neovim/Vim and Eclipse clients remain stable.
Tests include degraded-state response shapes.

tasks.title: Client auth and degraded-state tests add
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover missing token, invalid token, backend unreachable and capability missing.
Tests verify each client receives explicit degraded state rather than success.
Tests verify no token or secret appears in rendered errors/logs.

tasks.title: Bounded context and provenance tests add
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover selection, current file, buffer excerpt and project metadata packaging.
Tests verify payload size limits.
Tests verify provenance metadata is present.
Tests verify unrelated files and likely secrets are not silently included.

tasks.title: Client-originated policy and approval tests add
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify client-originated actions cannot bypass backend approval or policy.
Tests cover denied, stale, malformed and unauthorized approval/action requests.
Tests verify mutation-like actions remain explicit and auditable.

tasks.title: TUI import and startup tests add
acceptance_criteria: Test imports the TUI package without side effects.
Test starts TUI in scripted/headless/smoke mode.
Startup works with mocked backend configuration.
Startup failure path is readable and structured.

tasks.title: TUI view model tests add
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover health/connection view.
Tests cover task list and task detail views.
Tests cover artifact list and artifact detail views.
Tests cover empty, malformed, auth-failed and backend-unreachable states.

tasks.title: TUI approval and repair safety tests add
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify approval-required and policy-denied states render clearly.
Tests verify approval/reject actions call backend approval APIs only.
Tests verify repair session views do not execute repair actions implicitly.
Tests cover dry-run-first behavior where applicable.

tasks.title: TUI smoke checklist or automated terminal smoke add
acceptance_criteria: Automated smoke verifies health plus task/artifact rendering, or manual smoke checklist exists.
Smoke evidence is referenced from runtime inventory or release report.
Failure blocks runtime_complete claim.

tasks.title: Neovim headless load test add
acceptance_criteria: Headless Neovim loads the plugin from client_surfaces/nvim_runtime.
Expected Ananta commands are registered.
Load test fails on missing Lua modules or plugin entrypoint.
Test can run locally without a real backend by using mocked command paths.

tasks.title: Neovim command behavior tests add
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover AnantaGoalSubmit, AnantaAnalyze and AnantaReview command paths.
Tests verify commands call backend/client layer rather than local orchestration.
Tests verify degraded states render visibly.
Tests verify no command mutates files silently.

tasks.title: Neovim context packaging tests add
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover current file path, buffer excerpt and visual selection packaging.
Tests verify bounded size and provenance metadata.
Tests verify context inspection/confirmation path exists before send.

tasks.title: Vim compatibility tests or deferred enforcement add
acceptance_criteria: If Vim support is claimed, Vim plugin/autoload files are tested or manually smoke-checked.
If Vim is deferred, tests verify inventory/docs mark Vim as deferred and not runtime_mvp.
Audit script enforces the chosen Vim status.

tasks.title: Eclipse plugin project metadata tests add
acceptance_criteria: If Eclipse runtime_mvp is claimed, tests verify plugin project directory exists.
Tests verify plugin.xml and META-INF/MANIFEST.MF or equivalent build metadata.
If Eclipse is deferred/blocked, tests verify inventory/docs do not claim runtime availability.

tasks.title: Eclipse build smoke test add
acceptance_criteria: If Eclipse plugin is implemented, a build smoke command verifies compilation/packaging.
Build smoke validates target Eclipse/Java baseline metadata.
If build automation is not possible, manual build checklist is required and runtime_complete is blocked.

tasks.title: Eclipse context and command tests add
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover selection/file/project metadata handoff where practical.
Tests cover analyze/review/custom goal command mapping.
Tests verify context is bounded and user-visible before send.
Tests verify commands call Ananta backend APIs only.

tasks.title: Eclipse task artifact view smoke checklist add
acceptance_criteria: Checklist covers install/open, configure backend, send selection, create goal and inspect task/artifact.
Checklist includes expected results and known failure symptoms.
Checklist is required for runtime_mvp if automated Eclipse UI tests are not implemented.

tasks.title: Client golden path e2e suite add
acceptance_criteria: E2E suite covers client goal submission to task/artifact result with mocked worker/LLM execution.
TUI and Neovim paths are included when runtime_mvp is claimed.
Eclipse path is included as automated or manual smoke when runtime_mvp is claimed.
Visible status transitions and artifact availability are verified.

tasks.title: Core platform regression tests expand
acceptance_criteria: Regression suite covers CLI goal, repair flow, approval flow, artifact flow and degraded backend behavior.
Repair tests include unsafe/denied repair where execution must not happen.
Approval tests include allow, deny, approval-required and malformed action cases.

tasks.title: Release gate test runner consolidate
acceptance_criteria: One documented command runs audit, unit tests, contract tests and smoke checks where available.
Gate separates blocking automated checks from manual/advisory checks.
Gate fails on false runtime claims.

tasks.title: Merge readiness report tests add
acceptance_criteria: Tests verify merge readiness report includes final status for TUI, Neovim, Vim and Eclipse.
Report includes runtime file evidence, commands and test/smoke results.
Report separates blockers from later enhancements.

tasks.title: Post-test cleanup todo generate
acceptance_criteria: Remaining gaps are written into a cleanup todo or issue list.
Gaps distinguish missing implementation, weak test coverage, documentation drift and future enhancements.
Cleanup list excludes KRITIS and ref-profile unless directly impacted by client runtime tests.

execution_order_summary: Stage 1: Verify runtime evidence, audit behavior and todo consistency.
Stage 2: Test shared client contracts, auth, context and security.
Stage 3: Test TUI runtime startup and views.
Stage 5: Test or explicitly defer Eclipse plugin runtime.
Stage 6: Add e2e/golden-path and release-gate coverage.

TEST-M2.title: Shared client contract and security tests

notes: Erstes Umsetzungsbündel TEST-T01..TEST-T04 abgeschlossen und auf done synchronisiert.
tasks_status_summary und milestone-Status auf realen Fortschritt aktualisiert (4 done, 21 todo; TEST-M1 done).
execution_stage_summary für TEST-M1 auf done/todo=4/0 nachgezogen.
Zweites Umsetzungsbündel TEST-T05..TEST-T12 abgeschlossen und auf done synchronisiert (M2 und M3 done).
Abschlussbündel TEST-T13..TEST-T25 implementiert und auf done synchronisiert (M4, M5, M6 done).

summary_notes: This test todo assumes the runtime delivery todo.json has been fully and correctly implemented.
It no longer treats missing clients as the normal path; it verifies implemented runtime behavior.
Eclipse may still be deferred/blocked only if todo.json explicitly chose that path and inventory/docs agree.
The main purpose is to prove runtime evidence, safety boundaries and merge readiness.
Summary counters and stage rollups are now synchronized and explicitly documented.
First implementation bundle is now complete and reflected in synchronized status/stage counters.
Second implementation bundle completed contract/security/TUI runtime tests and synced rollups to 12/25 done.
Final implementation bundle completed Neovim/Vim, Eclipse, e2e/regression, release-gate and cleanup deliverables.

end_summaries.title: Analyseergebnis
items: Die aktuelle todo.json bildet einen eigenständigen Test-Hardening-Track mit 25 Tasks über 6 Meilensteine ab.
Struktur und Task-Zuordnung waren konsistent, aber die Priority-/Risk-Zähler in tasks_status_summary waren veraltet.

end_summaries.title: Korrekturen
items: by_priority korrigiert auf P0=16 und P1=9.
by_risk korrigiert auf high=10 und critical=11.
updated_at/checked_at auf den aktuellen Bearbeitungszeitpunkt gesetzt.

end_summaries.title: Verbesserungen und Erweiterungen
items: execution_stage_summary ergänzt (pro Meilenstein: scope_task_ids plus total/done/todo/in_progress/blocked).
analysis_checks ergänzt, um Prüfstand und Korrekturinhalt nachvollziehbar zu dokumentieren.
summary_notes um den synchronisierten Rollup-Status erweitert.

end_summaries.title: Status am Ende
items: Alle Umsetzungsbündel abgeschlossen: 25/25 done (100.0%), 0 todo; TEST-M1 bis TEST-M6 sind done.
Kritischer Pfad vollständig abgeschlossen: 16/16 done; Stage-Rollups und End-Summaries bleiben validator-konsistent.
